articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Gold, silver and bitcoin tumble as debasement trade unwinds
articles.description: Precious metals have fallen sharply from their 2025 highs as markets price in Fed rate hikes.

articles.title: Bitcoin could fall to $55,000 before finding a bottom, 10x Research says
articles.description: A strengthening U.S. dollar and the Fed's hawkish turn under new chair Kevin Warsh may keep pressure on crypto through the summer.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Aave (AAVE) gains 5.9% as index moves higher
articles.description: Internet Computer (ICP), up 2% from Tuesday, joined Aave (AAVE) as a top performer.

articles.title: Binance eyes alternative EU licensing route if Greek bid fails: Report
articles.description: Binance reportedly plans to seek authorization in another EU jurisdiction as the MiCA deadline approaches, with unlicensed crypto firms expected to wind down activities in the bloc.

articles.title: CZ, Binance founder, wants to clear up 'misunderstandings' about who he is
articles.description: The former CEO of the world's largest crypto exchange is seeking to redefine himself to the world on his own terms.

articles.title: Aave could soar to $3,500 by 2030 on DeFi revival, says StanChart
articles.description: Geoff Kendrick said Aave has moved past April's cyberattack-related market disruption and is well positioned to benefit from growth in tokenized assets and DeFi.

articles.title: SecondFi traces Cardano wallet exploit to address-level issue
articles.description: Cardano wallet SecondFi traced the incident to an address-level issue and secured 129 million ADA after attackers drained funds from 374 addresses.

articles.title: Morning Minute: Meta Is Building a Prediction Market
articles.description: Arthur Hayes put out a bull case for the CARDS token, and the Clarity Act is facing some surprising opposition from a new group.

articles.title: CBOE debuts prediction market with S&P 500 contracts
articles.description: Cboe launched its first prediction market product tied to the S&P 500 index, citing a growing investor demand for binary options contracts.

articles.title: DOJ Seizes Huione Infrastructure Linked to Billions in Crypto Laundering
articles.description: The seizure hits a cloud account that powered Huione Guarantee, a Telegram marketplace tied to billions in Southeast Asian scam proceeds.

articles.description: Your day-ahead look for June 24, 2026

articles.title: CryptoQuant warns on Strategy's dividend coverage as cash reserve falls 38%
articles.description: Strategy's cash reserves are now enough to pay only 14 months of dividends from the previous seven-year level. CryptoQuant said the company should pause Bitcoin purchases and rebuild its reserves.

articles.title: Aave positioned to capture tokenized asset growth in DeFi: Standard Chartered
articles.description: Standard Chartered said tokenized assets moving into DeFi could drive deposits into Aave and help the protocol rebuild its position as a dominant onchain lending platform.

articles.title: Bitcoin clings to $62,500 as bears tighten grip on crypto market
articles.description: Bitcoin held above $62,500 and ether near $1,665, but sluggish price action and widening put skews signal bears remain firmly in control.

articles.title: YZi Labs ends proxy war with BNB treasury company CEA Industries
articles.description: Partner Alex Odagiu will serve as an interim president, pending a search for a new chief executive, while head of YZi Labs Ella Zhang and Matthew Roszak also appointed directors of CEA.

articles.title: Cboe revives S&P 500 binary options, chasing a market popularized by Polymarket, Kalshi
articles.description: One of the largest U.S. derivatives exchanges is bringing back yes/no bets on the S&P 500 after pulling them a decade ago, moving onto turf that Polymarket and Kalshi turned into one of the internet's fastest-growing corners.

articles.title: Strategy's MSTR may plunge 80% if it repeats this dot-com-era fractal
articles.description: Strategy’s cash reserve is down 38% as dividend obligations near $1.2 billion, raising dilution risk for MSTR shareholders.

articles.title: Farage Says He Can Spend Tether Billionaire’s $6.7M Gift ‘On Ferraris’ if He Wants
articles.description: Reform UK leader Nigel Farage called the gift from Christopher Harborne a “private matter” amid a standards investigation.

articles.title: The Runes revival: Bitcoin traffic hits a two-year high as transactions blast past 820,000
articles.description: A surge in Rune protocol activity is pushing Bitcoin transaction counts and fee generation to multi year highs.

articles.title: BTC price four-year trend calls for $76K as analysis says Bitcoin 'not broken'

articles.title: South Korea adds token securities to capital market overhaul
articles.description: South Korea’s Financial Services Commission has placed token securities infrastructure within a wider capital-market modernization plan covering faster settlement, longer trading hours and digital transformation.

articles.title: Michael Saylor should halt Strategy's bitcoin buys, says CryptoQuant
articles.description: CryptoQuant says the cash cushion behind Strategy's STRC has thinned from seven years of coverage to 14 months, and buying BTC at cycle tops has left the company with a $10.6 billion paper loss.

articles.title: Trump lands in Senate's crosshairs over $500 million UAE investment in his crypto venture

articles.title: Bitcoin OGs aren't selling as aggressively as they did above $100,000

articles.title: Bitcoin drops toward $62,000 as the chip selloff deepens for a second day

articles.title: StarkWare introduces 'Private KYC' to address personal data breaches
